items.title: On Taelon Peter, the only player back from last year's Pacers Summer League who also happens to be heading to Vegas fighting for his two-way contract: www.indystar.com/story/sports...
items.author: Dustin Dopirak
items.body_excerpt: On Taelon Peter, the only player back from last year's Pacers Summer League who also happens to be heading to Vegas fighting for his two-way contract: www.indystar.com/story/sports...

media.title: Second-year Pacers guard using Summer League to lead even with roster spot not guaranteed
media.description: Taelon Peter is the only player on this year's Pacers' NBA Summer League roster who was also on last year's summer squad.

items.title: Small thing: With Braden Smith heading towards a two-way, Jalen Slawson's offer sheet suggests a battle for two-way slots is coming for the Pacers. Ethan Thompson and Taelon Peter signed two-year two-way deals last year: www.forbes.com/sites/tonyea...
items.author: Tony East
